_comment: Lender / Banking review deck for Northwind Holdings (DEMO). All credit figures are ILLUSTRATIVE synthetic data — not real Tiny figures.
title: Northwind Holdings — Credit & Covenant Update

slides.title: Credit & Covenant Update
slides.subtitle: Leverage, coverage, facility detail and covenant compliance for the lending syndicate.

slides.title: Credit Highlights
commentary: LTM Adj. EBITDA of $31.0M on LTM revenue of $156M (~27% margin), up 8.4% year over year.
Net leverage of 3.5x sits comfortably inside the 4.5x maximum covenant, improving 0.2x on debt paydown.
Interest coverage of 3.1x remains well above the 2.0x minimum, supported by EBITDA growth and stable rates.
slides.footnote: Illustrative credit figures — replace with live inputs.

slides.title: Leverage & Coverage
commentary: Net leverage 3.5x — 1.0x of headroom beneath the 4.5x covenant ceiling.
Interest coverage 3.1x — 1.1x of cushion above the 2.0x covenant floor.
slides.note: Illustrative credit figures — replace with live inputs.

slides.title: Debt by Facility
commentary: Senior term loan ($62M) is the anchor facility, ~47% of gross debt.
Revolver drawn $18M of a $40M commitment, leaving $22M of undrawn liquidity.
